title: Eriosorus lindigii
taxonomy: Eriosorus lindigii is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as the chain ferns or long chain ferns. The genus Eriosorus is part of the family Blechnaceae, and it includes several species of ferns native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. Eriosorus lindigii is a specific species within this group, known for its distinctive characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Eriosorus lindigii as a fern places it in the broader category of vascular plants and, more specifically, the division Pteridophyta. This classification highlights the unique features and adaptations of Eriosorus lindigii within the plant kingdom.
